gaps.gap: No candidate was built or benchmarked on the intended Android device/API/ABI matrix.
gaps.next_action: Run a one-device spike for SkyEmu and mGBA integration; record frame-time, underruns, input-to-photon latency, memory, battery, and thermal throttling.

gaps.gap: No owner decision on GPL-compatible open source versus closed-source/commercial distribution.
gaps.next_action: Choose licensing posture before selecting Lemuroid/LibretroDroid/RetroArch or a permissive/MPL route.

gaps.gap: No independent reproduction of SkyEmu, NanoBoyAdvance, or mGBA accuracy claims.
gaps.next_action: Run mGBA suite and MIT-licensed gba-tests against pinned core revisions; retain logs and hashes.

gaps.gap: Academic literature directly evaluating GBA emulator architecture on modern Android is sparse.
gaps.next_action: Treat Android platform docs and maintained OSS implementations as primary engineering evidence; use academic work only for transferable principles.

gaps.gap: No legal review for ROM/BIOS handling, anti-circumvention, trademark, cover art, or store territories.
gaps.next_action: Obtain counsel and Play policy review before distribution; default to user-supplied content and original app assets.

gaps.gap: Security posture is under-documented: only RetroArch among the main repositories exposed a root SECURITY.md in the retrieved tree.
gaps.next_action: Audit native parsers, archive handling, JNI boundaries, dependency SBOM, and vulnerability response before integration.

gaps.gap: Full texts were not acquired and screening/extraction were not human-approved.
gaps.next_action: If publication-grade conclusions are needed, complete human screening, approved full-text acquisition, extraction acceptance, and claim approval in an rforge project.
